name: America(Hetalia)
description:
When Alfred's friend says that she's going to the store for something, America says that he wants to go along! He should be allowed to go! She said exactly where they were going, but he was too busy talking about getting lunch too while they were out to really listen to her.

And now, standing outside the Sugar Silk, he sort of wished that he listened to her...
creator: SharkyBarky1234
